newsArray.title: Jersey seal historic win at Lords over MCC
newsArray.description: JERSEY captain Charles Perchard struck the winning blow as Jersey claimed their first ever victory at Lords Cricket Ground yesterday afternoon. Facing the Marylebone Cricket Club (MCC), the custodians of Lords, jersey travelled to England’s capital to take them on in what was scheduled for two T20 fixtures. newsArray.description: Akash Pawar’s four-wicket haul helped Cricket Club of India beat Marwari CC by 84 runs to enter the Salar Jung T20 final in Mumbai. CCI posted 271/7 before restricting their opponents to 187, setting up a title clash with Modern CC.
